name: mudsoldiermove/photoshop-smart-layer-manager
description: Advanced layer organization and automation plugin for Adobe Photoshop CC 2024+. Intelligent grouping, bulk renaming, hierarchy detection, and smart layer management powered by adaptive algorithms. Works with design systems, production pipelines, and complex document structures. Native UXP extension.

name: mixedstormplay/photoshop-batch-export-optimizer
description: Intelligent batch export plugin for Photoshop CC 2024+ with adaptive compression,  format optimization, and automated asset organization. Export hundreds of layers  with consistent quality and minimal file sizes. Includes web, mobile, ecommerce,  and print profiles. Built for production teams and design studios.

name: EnamelSpirit/ae-animation-expressions
description: Professional expression-based animation framework for After Effects 2024+.  Automates text sequencing, layer synchronization, and motion keyframe generation  with intelligent timing algorithms and adaptive animation presets. Built for motion  designers, video producers, and animation studios.

name: magmaduckplain/ae-expression-library
description: Production-ready expression toolkit for Adobe After Effects 2024+. Advanced property linking, dynamic text animation, sophisticated camera control, adaptive layer management, and automated timing solutions. Real-time preview with interactive UI panel. Built for motion designers, VFX artists, and broadcast production teams.

name: AxisCricketElevator/pdf-batch-processor
description: Advanced batch processing automation extension for Adobe Acrobat Pro. Intelligent document handling, metadata extraction, watermarking, and PDF optimization with adaptive algorithms. Streamline your document workflows.

name: AtomCardinalGlimpse/ccleaner-pro-system-optimizer
description: Advanced system maintenance and optimization utility. Intelligent junk file  removal, registry optimization, privacy protection, performance enhancement.  Safe deletion, browser cleanup, disk space recovery. Windows & macOS compatible.  Adaptive algorithms for optimal system health and stability.

name: TyrantDevelop/fl-studio-plugin-commander
description: Advanced MIDI control and intelligent workflow automation suite for FL Studio 21+. Real-time parameter mapping, adaptive effect chaining, MIDI learning, and production profile management. Streamline your workflow with intelligent automation.

name: ExteriorShinobi29/vegas-pro-ai-upscaler
description: Intelligent video enhancement plugin for Sony Vegas Pro. Neural upscaling (2x-4x),  adaptive noise reduction, motion-aware sharpening, and frame interpolation.  Professional-grade restoration for filmmakers, editors & studios.

name: sean-hayes58/pet-simulator-99-v2-script
description: Valex: Roblox Lua executor & script hub for Pet Simulator 99 on Windows. Auto-updating, keyless automation for grinding, hatching, and quests. Optimized for 2026.

name: loganhub52/m4vgear-media-converter
description: M4VGear v6.5.8: cross-platform DRM removal tool for offline media archiving. Features AI metadata enrichment, batch processing, and adaptive interface for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

name: tylerio1993/mors-transitions-v2026
description: Declarative workflow migration tool for zero-downtime infrastructure transitions. Features dependency graph planning, two-phase commit, rollbacks, auditing, and AI integration. Supports Windows, macOS, Linux. v2026.1.

name: caleb-hughes2000/burpsuite-executor-scripts
description: Security researcher's BurpSuite plugin collection 2026: non-BApp extensions, custom Java plugins, request tools, SQLMap integration, Shiro & WAF scanners, Python automation scripts. Handpicked for advanced pentesting workflows.

name: edwardsnathan1997/thunder-executor-windows
description: Valex: A lightweight Roblox Lua script executor for Windows PCs. Features one-click injection, integrated script hub with 500+ scripts, auto-update, and no key required. Optimized for 2026.
